message:
fix(net): properly shutdown TCP stream after WebSocket close handshake

The WebSocket client's close path completed the close frame exchange
but did not shut down the underlying TCP stream, leaving the
connection in a half-open state.  The remote peer would not receive
a TCP FIN and might wait indefinitely for more data or rely on
OS-level timeouts to detect the closed connection.

Adds AsyncWriteExt import and calls self.io.shutdown().await after
the close frame exchange completes, ensuring a clean TCP teardown
that signals the remote peer immediately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
